creator: jhmoon@hanabbs.com
text:
System halts after changing the disk from kern.flp to mfsroot.flp.

System configuration is:
ASUS P2B-DS
Dual Pentium II 450MHz
256 MB PC-100 NO-ECC RAM
AHA-7890 ON-BOARD SCSI
IBM Ultrastar 9ES (DDRS-39130)
One Floppy 1.44MB

BIOS:
IDE/Serial/Parallel ports are all disabled.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Reboot with the kern.flp.
